Steve Koo Photography is a professional wedding photographer based in Chicago, Illinois. Specializing in capturing authentic, emotional moments, Steve Koo Photography brings a unique artistic vision to every wedding. With 178 glowing reviews and a passion for storytelling, every image reflects the love and joy of your special day.
